titleStmt.title: SII 17.656Z: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 656. (A.R. No. 605 of 1904.) ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: ON THE EAST BASE OF THE LAKSHMĪNĀRĀYAṆA PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE.
This inscription is dated in the 38th regnal year of Parakēsarivarman who conquered Madurai and Īḻam i.e., Parāntaka I.

This records the sale of land by the Mūlaparaḍai (Mūlaparishad) of Mahēndramaṅgalam to Kāppiyaṉ Eḻuvaṉ-Gaṅgādharaṉ who endowed the same as tiruviḷakkuppuṟam to god Tiruvagnīśvarattu-pperumāṉaḍigaḷ. The land was made tax-free by the Mūlaparaḍai. The donor figures also in some more inscriptions from the place (vide Nos. 639 above, S.I.I. XIII, No. 2, No. 656-A, below).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
matiraiyum Īḻamuṅkoṇṭa śrīci kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 38 Āvatu [brahmadeya mahentra]maṅkalattu mūlaparaṭaiyom Ivvūr kāppiyaṉ Eḻuvaṅkaṅkātiraṉ
y kaikkoṇṭu Ippoṉṉukku tiruvagnīśvarattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku tiru viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku viḷakkuppuṟamāka paraṭaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu pāl Eṉṟum yñca
lamuta peṟpaṭṭa nilam viṟṟukkuṭuttaṟkicaitta vellai kiḻpāṟkellai vañcivāykkā lukku mekkum teṉpāṟkellai vañci vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai toṭṭiyattu perunilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai toṭṭiyattu
lai lukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilat tukku Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi Iṟaiyili tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom mūlaparuṭaiyom tiruagnīśvarattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Innilat
tināl vanta Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum veṭṭi vetiṉaiyum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum paraṭaiyom viṟ kiṉṟa nilattiṉ meleṟṟikkoṇṭu Iṟuppatāka Iṟaiyiḻittu Eḻuvaṅkaṅkātiraṉukku ṉṟum cantrādityaval Erivatāka vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu
kuṭuttom paraṭaiyom perumāṉaṭikaḷukku[*] vilaipporuḷ Aiṅkaḻañcum Eḻuvaṅkātiraṉiṭai Āvaṇakkaḷiye poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu Innilam viḷakkuppuṟamāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaiyumituveyāka poruḷmāvaṟu
tip poruṭ cilavu Aṟṟu lai kuṭuttom mūlaparaṭaiyom tiru Agnīśvarattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku
Digital edition of SII 17.656Z by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
